text: <par>Is the last syll from *mul or *r-maw? cf. feather.</par>
<par>This Manang form proves the independence of etyma <xref ref="259">#259</xref> (<latinform>nyog¹</latinform>) and <xref ref="254">#254</xref> (<latinform>nyɛː⁴</latinform>).</par>
